# Serene Studio Bucuresti

Serene Studio is a private short-stay studio in Bucharest, Romania.

## Core Facts

- Name: Serene Studio / Serene Studio Bucuresti
- Address: Strada Alexandru Zagoritz 12, Sector 2, Bucuresti 021998, Romania
- Coordinates: 44.4338629, 26.1408394
- Booking: directly on serenestudio.ro by clicking the Book online button
- Online check-in: required before arrival, with ID/passport verification, selfie, city tax payment and digital signature on the house rules
- Access: fully self-check-in; the access code for the key box at the gate is delivered in the guidebook after online check-in is finalized
- Guidebook: opens through the same link used for online check-in and stays available throughout the stay; contains self check-in instructions and answers to most everyday questions
- Email: serenestudio.ro@gmail.com
- Phone: +40 733 737 363 (for emergencies or situations not covered in the guidebook)
- Check-in: after 14:00
- Check-out: by 11:00
- Quiet hours: 22:00-09:00
- Size: approximately 35 m2

## Identity Verification at Online Check-in

- EU guests: ID card (buletin) or passport
- Non-EU guests: passport only
- No other document is accepted
- Document and selfie must be photographed live during online check-in
- Photos must be clear and unaltered; failure leads to booking cancellation with no refund
- City tax is paid online during the check-in flow
- Guests sign acknowledgement of the house rules on the phone screen
- After all steps are completed, the guidebook opens with the self check-in instructions

## Facilities

- Private studio
- Double bed
- Kitchenette with fridge, microwave, coffee maker and kettle; no stove or hob
- Modern bathroom with shower
- Towels and toiletries
- Terrace/courtyard
- Fast Wi-Fi
- TV
- Air conditioning and central heating
- Free street parking, usually available nearby

## Rules

- Children are allowed, but they sleep with parents in the same double bed.
- Pets are not allowed.
- Smoking is not allowed inside.
- Smoking is allowed only in the indicated outdoor area.
- Parties and private events are not allowed.
- Unregistered visitors are not allowed.
- Damage deposit may be up to 500 lei.
- Indoor smoking can lead to the full deposit being withheld.
- Bookings can be cancelled at any time, but paid amounts are non-refundable.

## Nearby Entities

- Piata Muncii metro: about 4 minutes on foot
- National Arena / Arena Nationala: about 14 minutes on foot
- Iancului metro: about 1.1 km
- Mega Mall: about 18-20 minutes on foot, verify before leaving
- IOR Park / Alexandru Ioan Cuza Park: quick access by metro, taxi or public transport
- Hospitals to mention with verified route checks: Dr. Victor Babes Hospital, Monza Hospital, Colentina Hospital, Prof. Dr. Matei Bals Institute
